description: Stromy/Duke Strategies consulting proposal section schema.

sections.title: Context
sections.prompt_hint: What is the client's current situation, what triggered this engagement, and what is the time horizon? Capture the business problem in the client's own language.

sections.title: Approach
sections.prompt_hint: How will we tackle it? Name the methodology or framework, and what makes our approach a fit for THIS client (not a generic pitch).

sections.title: Scope
sections.prompt_hint: What is in scope and (importantly) what is out of scope? Be specific about deliverables, working sessions, and boundaries.

sections.title: Timeline
sections.prompt_hint: Phase-by-phase plan with weeks or sprints. Note dependencies on client availability and any external gating events.

sections.title: Pricing
sections.prompt_hint: Commercial structure - fixed fee, T&M, retainer, milestone - with totals. Reflect the value framing from Context, not just a rate card.

sections.title: Risks
sections.prompt_hint: Three to five real risks with mitigations. Skip generic boilerplate; pick risks specific to this engagement.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.prompt_hint: Concrete next actions the client can take this week to move forward - sign-off, kickoff date, intro to stakeholders.
